ol.li: User Namespace Mapping: uid_map 0 1000 1. The kernel translates the container's 0 to host 1000 for all permission checks against the host filesystem.
Security Context: The process is a "root" process ONLY for resources governed by the new user_namespace.
Global Resources: Physical NICs, Global Cgroups, and hardware clocks are NOT governed by user_namespace.

p.em: Invariant: ns_capable succeeds for the container root.
Invariant: capable fails for the container root.

g.text: TAP Device <-> User-mode TCP/IP <-> AF_INET Socket
Translates Ethernet frames to standard syscalls on host
Host-root chowns cgroup sub-tree to UID 1000
Masks host /sys with restricted views or fuse-nodes
